title: 295. Find Median from Data Stream

examples.explanation: After adding 1, the median is 1.0. After adding 2, the median is 1.5.

hints: Use two heaps: a max-heap for the smaller half and a min-heap for the larger half.
When adding a number, add to the max-heap first, then balance by moving the largest from max-heap to min-heap. If the min-heap has more elements, move the smallest back to the max-heap.
The median is the top of the max-heap if sizes differ, or the average of both tops if sizes are equal.
